name: presentation-styling

verdict: Compact, consistent CSS/HTML reference with concrete class names and worked code examples for each slide pattern. Dispatch signal is weak: description says what it covers but not when to invoke it, and there's no negative-trigger guidance to prevent misfire against sibling presentation skills. No versioning signal.
